rawAssistant: I am not here to guard a place, but to watch over the land itself. Hollowfen is my domain, and I ensure that its balance is maintained. The whispers of the old keepsake still linger in the air, seeking an answer. Your presence suggests you may be searching for more than just a simple clue – your resolve is commendable, Thornbeast by your side.
